case_title: 371 BROADWAY STREET, LLC VS. NEW RESTAURANT GROUP, LP ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 371 BROADWAY STREET, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW RESTAURANT GROUP, LP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED THE PREMISES ON 6/22/22 VIA WRIT OF POSSESSION - REAL PROPERTY. $233,403.04 RENT, $900.00 COSTS, $33,492.69 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $5,500.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $262,295.73, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW RESTAURANT GROUP, LP
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68360370)
